brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have specific anxieties — jitters, energy crashes, and giving up a beloved ritual — so directly addressing those pain points and positioning Tulsi Green Tea as the calm, credible solution drives the highest purchase confidence.
copyOptions.visual_description: The uploaded Organica Tulsi Green Tea pouch stands upright at a slight forward angle on the left half of the frame, photographed against a soft sage-to-mint green gradient background that brightens toward the center. A gentle natural-style light source creates a subtle drop shadow beneath the product, giving it a grounded, editorial feel. The product label faces forward fully, ensuring all branding and text remain clearly legible, with no props or lifestyle elements competing for attention.
headlines: Ditch the Jitters. Not the Ritual.
subheadlines: Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you steady, clean energy — no crash, no anxiety, no regrets.
Gentle, grounding, and naturally energising — crafted for people ready to leave coffee behind.
Thousands have already made the switch. Tulsi Green Tea makes it easy to stay switched.
